hero.pitch: OPS CORPORATION secures your infrastructure, deploys your networks, and builds your web applications — with rigor, responsiveness, and local expertise in Lomé.

reactive.title: Responsiveness
reactive.desc: Controlled response times and available support. Your incidents are handled quickly — your projects keep moving.

expertise.title: Dual expertise
expertise.desc: IT infrastructure and web development in a single team. Fewer contacts, more coherence, more efficiency.

local.title: Local presence
local.desc: Based in Lomé, we operate on-site in Togo and support your projects remotely across Africa and beyond.

skills.label: Technical Expertise
skills.title: Core skills
skills.subtitle: Dual focus on systems / networks and web development, with reliability, security, and performance in mind.

soc.title: Mini-SOC & monitoring
soc.desc: Set up a mini-SOC with centralized event collection, alert correlation, and incident management to reduce MTTR.

backbone.title: Multi-site backbone
backbone.desc: Secure multi-site network rollout with relays, logical flow segmentation (QoS / VLAN), and continuous monitoring.

portal.title: Next.js client portal
portal.desc: Client portal and back-office with Node.js API, RBAC authentication, dashboards, and a modern interface.

managed.title: Managed services & support
managed.desc: Proactive monitoring, scheduled maintenance, and user support to ensure the availability and performance of your systems.

deployment.title: Deployment & monitoring
deployment.desc: Full installation, configuration, and observability of your server, network, and cloud infrastructure.

security.title: Security & SOC
security.desc: Audit, defense hardening, proactive threat detection, and structured incident response.

webapps.title: Custom web applications
webapps.desc: Modern, performant, and maintainable applications — from REST API to user interface.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's talk about your project.
contact.pitch: Describe your need — we'll get back to you within 24 hours with a concrete, tailored proposal.
